2339090.name: Sunhara: Ecorpy Islands
2339090.description:
The Great Butterfly Jewel has shattered and dark matter has scattered all over the islands of the Ecorpy Kingdom. You and your magic hammer are the only ones who can resolve the situation!

"Sunhara: Ecorpy Islands" is a casual 3D platformer where you play the role of a little girl named "Clara" who finds herself forced to clean up all the dark matter scattered all over the islands of the Ecorpy Kingdom since she found a grumpy magic hammer named "Olala", in some touristic ruins.

Cleans the islands, collect all the lost Butterfly Jowels, help the different ecorpies you come across, and more !

Key Features

  • Clean up all islands affected by dark matter
  • Collect all the butterfly jewels scattered across the kingdom's islands!
  • Learn to wall jump, dive and use your magical hammer to slide on walls !
  • 7 Hammer Transformations !
  • Only support controllers for now.
